title: UK anti-corruption strategy 2025
body: "This strategy sets out the government’s strategic approach to stopping corruption at home and abroad. It builds on the 2017 to 2022 strategy and reflects the evolving nature of the threats posed by corruption to the UK’s economy, security and democracy.  The strategy includes 123 commitments across government, which aim to:   combat corrupt actors and their funds in the UK and overseas tackle vulnerabilities to corruption in the UK build global resilience to corruption   Background research for the strategy   International approaches to recording and monitoring corruption UK public’s concerns, perceptions and understanding of corruption Economic Crime Survey 2024   "
